title: Longest Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string x containing just the characters '(' and ')', return the length of the longest valid (well-formed) parentheses substring.
outputFormat: Integer representing the maximum valid length
hint: You can solve this with or without a stack! Try doing two passes: one scanning left-to-right counting '(' and ')', and one scanning right-to-left. Reset counters when the pattern becomes invalid.
